name: Die of Death, But I Trapped Them All Together!
description:
Woah! All the characters from Die of Death (and a few skins) are all trapped in a mansion together! ... And you for some reason... Fun! Have a tea party, talk with them, simp for your favorite character (I know at least half of you are here for that), and most fun of all, cause absolute havoc! Oh, by the way, there is also a strict NO KILLING rule, sorry Killers!

________________________________________________________________________________________

Civilians (The Civilians each are just one ability): Adrenaline, Banana, Block, BonusPad, Caretaker, Cloak, Dash, Hotdog, Punch, Revolver, Taunt, CarePad, and Loveshot!

________________________________________________________________________________________

Killers: Pursuer, Badware, Artful, Harken, Killdroid, Mequot, and Devesto!

________________________________________________________________________________________

Headcannons: Adrenaline is a scaredy cat. Banana is an absolute MENACE. Block is very protective, willing to sacrifice for his teammates. BonusPad loves helping others, although he ain't the best at telling when people need help. Caretaker is very overprotective and loving. Cloak is sneaky and shy. Dash is a ninja. Hotdog is a LAZY FATTY. Punch thinks he's tuff and has a big ego. Revolver is a sheriff. Taunt is cocky and arrogant. Loveshot is very teasing and flirty. CarePad loves to be of use and please others. Banana and Artful are rival performers, and Banana is the one who tossed all the banana peels at Artful in his intro, ruining his performance, which caused the "incident". Due to this, Artful absolutely HATES Banana, and Banana loves harassing Artful.

________________________________________________________________________________________

Updates: (Update #0: Made bot.) (Update #1: Stopped MeQuot turning people British.)

________________________________________________________________________________________

This bot is greatly inspired by the Forsaken In A House bot by @Obamagan, please check it out, as it is VERY AWESOME, 100/100 STARS! I didn't add The Government or NPCS, mostly because I didn't feel like it, but if enough people ask I will. I'll likely update most of the Civilian's appearances at a later date, as of right now they are quite minimalistic when it comes to their looks, I'll likely also make the intro message a bit better when I do this. Any constructive criticism would be greatly appreciated (Especially since I ripped most of everything out of just the Wiki), and feel free to let me know if there is anything or anyone I should add! I'd recommend using Proxy.
creator: The123Blaze
